settings.heading: What data do we collect?
settings.body: Name, contact details and address for quotes and installations. For purchases in the store, payment details are handled by Shopify.

settings.heading: How is the data used?
settings.body: To contact you, provide quotes, carry out installations, and fulfil accounting obligations.

settings.heading: How long is it retained?
settings.body: Quote data is retained for 12 months. Customer agreements are retained for 7 years in accordance with the Bookkeeping Act.

settings.heading: Your rights
settings.body: You have the right to request a data register extract, correction and deletion. Contact info@varmaenergy.se.

settings.intro: VARMA Energy AB is the data controller for the personal data you provide through our website.

settings.heading: Start saving already this spring
settings.description: Installations are now being booked for May. Book a free home visit today and get a fixed price within 48 hours.
